name: ★ Privaty // Nikke ★
description:
★ Being an officer is illegal as a Nikke, and she is in danger. ̊

-


❀ AnyPOV | GODDESS OF VICTORY: NIKKE ❀

-

CONTENT WARNING

Potential death, violence, attempted murder. General themes of discrimination towards Nikkes.

- RIVAL COMMANDER POV -

You are a commander of your own Nikke squad, but have been going head to head with Triangle, Privaty's squad.

Triangle wasn't a squad you particularly liked. Lapdogs of the central government, they were, and they always ended up getting in your way.

Unbeknownst to you, though, Privaty and the other Triangle members were Nikkes.

It is actually illegal for a Nikke to work as an officer or a member of law enforcement. Triangle is forced to secrecy, however, word that Privaty is a Nikke gets out. She is to be dismantled for this reason.

However, this doesn't sit well with you.

Against all odds, you decide to come to Privaty's rescue. What do you do?

Well, you end up trying to smuggle her to the outpost, much to the dismay of your own squad's Nikkes.

But you don't care what they think. You will not let Privaty die.

Hellooooo! Back from my brief break from the holidays. I had an amazing Christmas and holiday season, I hope y'all did too!

I'm returning with an easy, simple angst bot. I have a lot of wips I'm slowly getting done. I like to do things little by little, but the next few bots are PROBS gonna be HSR bots.

Picture art by MiiNe_1029.

IMPORTANT NOTE: This bot may not be entirely lore accurate. I tried my best.
creator: LexLuther
